channel.title: FMaInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMaInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO turnover favors company insiders
item.description: Recent CEO changes in the Fortune 500 show a preference for candidates built in-house.

item.title: California farmers warn of costs strangling family farms
item.description: Soaring diesel prices, high electricity rates and regulations push small farms to the breaking point.

item.title: Florida's middle class squeezed by wealthy newcomers
item.description: Rising home prices, insurance costs and cash buyers are pricing Florida's middle class out of the market.

item.title: SLB Q1 2026 net income slips 6% to $752m
